params.name: Lucky Horseshoe
params.description: The magical lucky horseshoe, typically forged into a crescent shape, symbolizes the ancient Greek goddess of hunting and the moon, Artemis. It is said that only when it is nailed above a door with the open end facing upwards, can it bring good fortune…
params.ss1:
Snail HP +200
Per 10 Lucky Coins gained, Snail RUSH +1
Lucky Coins Gained: 400/400
